name: Zhang Bao | Shu
description:
Son of the Indomitable.

Dynasty Warriors version.

~

Sometimes the inability to sit still crawls under his skin.

~

Doing some work on the cast since I’m snowed in :) Lorebook for Shu will also be completed and attached to all Shu characters!

I’ve had poor Zhang Bao half finished for MONTHS now but just put it off like a silly worm lol

Mild warnings for how this is literally taking place in a brutal, sexist, chaotic wartime period.
creator: Clementine00
